zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Lindsay於大約1404年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford18歲，母親Lady Majory Dunbar16歲。她和Sir James Auchinleck of Auchinleck and  of that ilk至少有1個兒子。她去世於1466年在英國蘇格蘭享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Lindsay于大约1404年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford18岁，母亲Lady Majory Dunbar16岁。她和Sir James Auchinleck of Auchinleck and  of that ilk至少有1个儿子。她去世于1466年在英国苏格兰享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Lindsay was born about 1404, in Scotland, her father, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, was 18 and her mother, Lady Majory Dunbar, was 16. She had at least 1 son with Sir James Auchinleck of Auchinleck and  of that ilk. She died in 1466, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Lindsay est née environ 1404, à Écosse, son père, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Majory Dunbar, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir James Auchinleck of Auchinleck and  of that ilk. Elle est décédée en 1466, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Lindsay um 1404 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford 18 und ihre Mutter Lady Majory Dunbar 16. Sie hatte mit Sir James Auchinleck of Auchinleck and  of that ilk mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1466 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Lindsay è nata il circa 1404 nel Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Lady Majory Dunbar, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir James Auchinleck of Auchinleck and  of that ilk. Morì nel 1466, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Lindsayが約1404年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawfordは18歳，母Lady Majory Dunbarは16歳であった。彼女はSir James Auchinleck of Auchinleck and  of that ilkとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1466年にイギリススコットランドで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Lindsay(이)가 대략 1404년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Majory Dunbar(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Sir James Auchinleck of Auchinleck and  of that ilk(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Lindsay nasceu aproximadamente 1404, em Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lady Majory Dunbar, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sir James Auchinleck of Auchinleck and  of that ilk. Ela faleceu em 1466, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Lindsay родилась около 1404 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Majory Dunbar, 16. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir James Auchinleck of Auchinleck and  of that ilk. Она умерла в 1466 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Lindsay nació aproximadamente 1404, en Scotland, su papá, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Lady Majory Dunbar, tenía 16 años.
